channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Priceless: Lee Zeldin Drops the Receipts on Rosa DeLauro in Fiery Budget Hearing Exchange
Wowsers: Hakeem Jeffries Has a 'Crossing the Rubicon' Moment, and There May Be No Turning Back From Here
Report: Google Signs Classified AI Deal With Pentagon
item.description: Alphabet's Google joined a growing list of technology firms to sign a deal with the U.S. Department of Defense to use its artificial intelligence mode...

item.title: Trump Floats Renaming Agency the Left Hates - and It Just Might Send Them Straight to the Loony Bin
